rules.name: myRule_1
rules.label: BP Credit Check accepted under conditions

rules.name: myRule_3
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5) AND 6 AND (7 OR 8) AND 9
rules.label: ORIGIN Credit Check accepted under conditions

rules.name: myRule_5
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: ALD Credit Check accepted under conditions

rules.name: myRule_3_pmetrule
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND (4 OR 5) AND 6 AND (7 OR 8) AND 9
rules.label: Previously Met - Prev

rules.name: myRule_5_pmetrule
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR 3) AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: Previously Met - Prev

Flow.description: This process sends email alerts to users' managers when a credit check is automatically accepted under conditions by the 'Decision Tree'
Flow.label: FRA_Credit_Check_ApprovalDecision_EmailManager
